Codex usage reportedly grew >10x in six months to ~7M users, possibly overtaking Claude Code.

   Affects any scraping or agent traffic hitting Cloudflare-protected sites.

   Enables agent/CLI-driven iOS builds — directly applicable to CalenCall.
